title: Budget Codes
description: Collections of budget phases for one or more fiscal years.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the budget code.

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of the budget code.

description.title: Description
description.description: The description of the budget code.

code.title: Code
code.description: The code used to identify the budget code.

reportingSegment.title: Reporting Segment
reportingSegment.description: The segment with which the budget code is associated.

fiscalYear.title: Fiscal Year
fiscalYear.description: The fiscal year associated with the budget code.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Fiscal Year.
